computational_photography_group_-_cphoto: TheComputational Photography Groupof Brno University of Technology is a part of the Faculty of Information Technology. Our research activities focus on HDR image and video processing, image and video quality assessment, computational aesthetics, image registration, and human visual perception. We offer several courses on computational photography and advanced image processing.
current_research_topics: TheComputational Photography Group(CPhoto@FIT) focuses on research ofvisual image localization,HDR image and video processing,image and video quality assessment, computational aesthetics, image registration, and human visual perception. We offer several courses on computational photography and advanced image processing.
cooperation: Max Planck Institut Informatik , Saarbrucken, Germany
more_information: CPhoto@FITorganizesHigh Visual Computing(HiVisComp) - an annual meeting of computer graphics and computer vision people in the mountains:http://www.hiviscomp.cz/2014/http://www.hiviscomp.cz/2015/http://www.hiviscomp.cz/2016/http://www.hiviscomp.cz/2017/http://www.hiviscomp.cz/2018/http://www.hiviscomp.cz/2019/http://www.hiviscomp.cz/CPhoto@FITalso organizesVGS-IT, prestigious invited talk series.
information: http://cphoto.fit.vutbr.cz/Martin CadikFaculty of Information TechnologyBrno University of Technology,Bozetechova 1, 612 00 Brno, Czech Republic
